Istanbul · 30 April to 3 May 2026

Polina's
30th.

Istanbul, Turkey

Arrives 30 April
Departs 3 May
Guests 16 people

Four days in one of the world's most electric cities. Bosphorus sunsets, rooftop dinners, a private boat, great food and the best people.

Day by Day

The Programme

01 Thu 30 Apr Arrival

Welcome to Istanbul

All day
Individual arrivals Everyone arrives on their own schedule. Check-in at the Airbnb from 3pm.
20:45
Dinner at Garden 1897 First dinner together as a group. Confirmed
02 Fri 1 May On the Water

Bosphorus Day

Lunch
Lunch TBD
16:00 to 20:00
Bosphorus Boat Trip Four hours on the water with the whole group. Two continents, golden hour light. Booked
20:30
Dinner at Ali Ocakbasi Istanbul's iconic grill house in Gumusssuyu. Wood-fire kebabs and mezze. Confirmed
03 Sat 2 May The Birthday

Polina's 30th

Morning
Turkish Breakfast TBD
Afternoon
Free time
Explore the bazaars, visit Hagia Sophia, wander Beyoglu, beauty treatments or simply hang out at the apartment.
20:45
Birthday Dinner at Murver Rooftop restaurant with panoramic Bosphorus views. Confirmed
04 Sun 3 May Goodbye

Last Morning

Morning
Check-out and individual departures One last coffee, some baklava for the road.
Where We Sleep

Our Airbnb

Property Sinpas Queen Bomonti Residence

34380 Sisli / Istanbul

Getting There

Logistics & Info

🚗

Private Driver

We have a private driver available for airport transfers and group outings. The airport pick-ups and drop-offs will be organised.

Name: TBD
Phone: TBD

💳

Money

Currency: Turkish Lira (TRY)
Cards accepted widely. Cash is useful for the bazaars and smaller spots.

We are using Tricount to split shared expenses. Link in the footer.

Swiss guests: no visa required (up to 90 days).

📱

Stay in the Loop

WhatsApp Group: link TBD

All updates, last-minute changes and the door code go there. Make sure your data works in Turkey, or pick up a local SIM at the airport.

🌡️

Weather

Late April in Istanbul is beautiful. Warm days, mild evenings.

Temperature: 15 to 22°C
Evenings: bring a light jacket
Rain: possible, a small umbrella helps

Dress code for dinners: smart casual.

✨

Good to Know

Timezone: UTC+3 (1hr ahead of Switzerland)
Emergency: 112
Nearest pharmacy: ask the driver

Tipping: 10% at restaurants is appreciated. Not mandatory but kind.

💇

Hairdresser in the Building

7 Bomonti Kuaför ve Güzellik Merkezi is right in our building.

Book via WhatsApp: +90 530 447 72 77

A blowout costs around CHF 20. Perfect before the birthday dinner.

See you at the Bosphorus.
